description_long: This jewelry piece is a beaded necklace featuring alternating large spherical beads in a metallic bronze color and slightly smaller, oval-shaped beads in a glossy black finish. The beads are strung together on a fine, likely metallic chain, with small gold-toned links visible between each bead. The necklace has a bold, chunky appearance, with the beads evenly spaced and symmetrically arranged around the chain. The metallic and glossy surfaces of the beads create a striking contrast, giving the necklace a modern yet elegant look. The overall design is simple but eye-catching, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A chunky beaded necklace with alternating metallic bronze and glossy black beads on a fine gold-toned chain, creating a bold and modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical arrangement of large bronze and black beads, highlighting the necklace's bold, chunky design.
description_view_1: Left angled view emphasizes the roundness and shine of the beads, with the gold-toned chain links partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the even spacing of the beads and the continuous loop of the necklace around the display stand.
description_view_3: Right angled view mirrors the left, showing the alternating bead pattern and the reflective surfaces of the beads.
